params.name: Mouth Of Truth
params.description:
On Feb 7, 1632 AD, people discovered the Mouth of Truth on the exterior wall of the Santa Maria in Cosmedin church.
The Mouth of Truth is a carved marble disc depicting the face of Triton, the son of the sea god. Legend has it that if someone tells a lie in front of it, it will bite the hand that the person puts into its mouth. Because of this wonderful rumor, people flock to see it, creating a good story.
